name: GLM-130B
license: Custom GLM-130B Model License (non-commercial research; code Apache-2.0)
note: GPT-3-scale 130B bilingual (EN/ZH) dense model; open code, weights and training logs (ICLR 2023).

results.notes: Zero-shot accuracy; beats GPT-3 175B, OPT-175B, BLOOM-176B

BIG-bench-lite (24 tasks), zero-shot accuracy, Table 4 of the GLM-130B paper (arXiv:2210.02414). Paper states GLM-130B outperforms GPT-3 175B (4.35 zero-shot) and even PaLM 540B in this zero-shot setting; also reports 1-shot=14.91 and 3-shot=15.12 for GLM-130B, but few-shot gains are smaller than GPT-3's. This is a genuinely new benchmark not previously tracked for this model (previously only LAMBADA and MMLU were tracked).

verificationNotes: Fully confirmed via arXiv:2210.02414 (ar5iv HTML). LAMBADA zero-shot 80.2 and MMLU 5-shot 44.8 both appear verbatim in the paper. MODEL_LICENSE on GitHub confirms non-commercial-research-only restriction plus China-specific clauses; code is Apache-2.0. Paper confirms 130B bilingual EN/ZH dense GLM-objective model, ICLR 2023 acceptance, training completed July 2022 with public release/report August 2022. No changes made.
